info.name: Sky World Survey Platform API
info.description: REST API for the Survey Platform pre-interview task. All responses are XML. Base URL is controlled by the {{base_url}} variable.

body.raw:
<survey>
<name>Graduate Developer Application Survey</name>
<description>Initial candidate screening survey</description>
</survey>

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<survey id="1"><name>Graduate Developer Application Survey</name><description>Initial candidate screening survey</description></survey>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<surveys><survey id="1"><name>Graduate Developer Application Survey</name><description>Initial candidate screening survey</description></survey><survey id="2"><name>Internship Application Survey</name><description>Internship application survey</description></survey></surveys>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<survey id="1"><name>Graduate Developer Application Survey</name><description>Initial candidate screening survey</description></survey>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<survey id="1"><name>Updated Survey Name</name><description>Updated description</description></survey>

body.raw:
<question name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes">
<text>What is your full name?</text>
<description>[Surname] [First Name] [Other Names]</description>
</question>

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question id="1" name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes"><text>What is your full name?</text><description>[Surname] [First Name] [Other Names]</description></question>

body.raw:
<question name="programming_stack" type="choice" required="yes">
<text>What programming stack are you familiar with?</text>
<description>You can select multiple</description>
<options multiple="yes">
<option value="REACT">React JS</option>
<option value="ANGULAR">Angular</option>
<option value="VUE">Vue JS</option>
</options>
</question>

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question id="2" name="programming_stack" type="choice" required="yes"><text>What programming stack are you familiar with?</text><description>You can select multiple</description><options multiple="yes"><option value="REACT">React JS</option><option value="ANGULAR">Angular</option><option value="VUE">Vue JS</option></options></question>

body.raw:
<question name="certificates" type="file" required="yes">
<text>Upload any of your certificates?</text>
<description>You can upload multiple (.pdf)</description>
</question>

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question id="3" name="certificates" type="file" required="yes"><text>Upload any of your certificates?</text><description>You can upload multiple (.pdf)</description><file_properties format=".pdf" max_file_size="1" max_file_size_unit="mb" multiple="no" /></question>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<questions><question id="1" name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes"><text>What is your full name?</text><description>[Surname] [First Name] [Other Names]</description></question></questions>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question id="1" name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes"><text>What is your full name?</text><description>[Surname] [First Name] [Other Names]</description></question>

body.raw:
<question name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes">
<text>What is your full legal name?</text>
<description>Updated description</description>
</question>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question id="1" name="full_name" type="short_text" required="yes"><text>What is your full legal name?</text><description>Updated description</description></question>

formdata.value: I am an experienced Frontend Engineer.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question_response><full_name>Jane Doe</full_name><email_address>janedoe@gmail.com</email_address><description>I am an experienced Frontend Engineer.</description><gender>FEMALE</gender><programming_stack>REACT,VUE</programming_stack><certificates><certificate>Adobe Certification.pdf</certificate><certificate>Figma Fundamentals.pdf</certificate></certificates><date_responded>2026-06-05 12:30:12</date_responded></question_response>

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<question_responses current_page="1" last_page="1" page_size="10" total_count="1"><question_response><response_id>1</response_id><full_name>Jane Doe</full_name><email_address>janedoe@gmail.com</email_address><description>I am an experienced Frontend Engineer.</description><gender>FEMALE</gender><programming_stack>REACT,VUE</programming_stack><certificates><certificate id="1">Adobe Certification.pdf</certificate><certificate id="2">Figma Fundamentals.pdf</certificate></certificates><date_responded>2026-06-05 12:30:12</date_responded></question_response></question_responses>
